---
title: "Welcome to the RC42 Digital Portal"
description: "RC42 Social Psychology launches a complementary digital portal."
author: "RC42 Board"
date: "2025-06-01"
categories: [announcement]
---

## Welcome to the RC42 Social Psychology Digital Portal

RC42 Social Psychology is pleased to announce the launch of this complementary digital portal, designed to enhance communication, visibility, and collaboration among members worldwide.

### What Is This Portal?

This website serves as an extension of the [official ISA RC42 page](https://www.isa-sociology.org/en/research-networks/research-committees/rc42-social-psychology/). It provides:

- **Members directory**: A voluntary listing of RC42 members with their research profiles.
- **News and events**: Announcements and upcoming activities relevant to the RC42 community.
- **Opportunities**: Calls for papers, positions, fellowships, and other professional opportunities.
- **Newsletter archive**: Past editions of the RC42 newsletter.
- **Resources**: Publications, teaching materials, and research tools shared by members.
- **Participation pathways**: Easy ways to contribute content and engage with the community.

### How to Participate

We invite all RC42 members to:

1. **Create a member profile** — Share your research interests and connect with colleagues. [Create profile →](../../../participate/create-profile.qmd)
2. **Submit contributions** — Share news, events, opportunities, or resources. [Submit →](../../../participate/submit-contribution.qmd)
3. **Provide feedback** — Help us improve this portal. [Contact us →](../../../contact/index.qmd)

### What's Next?

This portal will grow with contributions from the RC42 community. Upcoming developments may include:

- Full member profiles for all board members
- Event listings for the XXI ISA World Congress of Sociology 2027
- An expanded newsletter archive
- Shared resources and reading lists

::: {.info-box}
All content on this portal is reviewed and approved by the RC42 board before publication. Nothing is published automatically without human review.
:::

We look forward to building this resource together with the RC42 community.

— **The RC42 Board 2023–2027**
